rationale: The cited paper is used in a single, narrow spot in the unit-economics discussion to support the claim that only a small portion of advertising spend is likely aimed at retention. The citing article does not rely on Thomas (2001) for its main customer-behavior model, estimation approach, or valuation framework. There is no direct methodological borrowing or theoretical build-out from the cited work in the core analysis, so the citation functions as background support rather than a substantive dependency.
